name: teams-workspace
intent: Add teams and workspace management feature. Users should be able to create organizations, add teams within those organizations (with support for nested team hierarchies), and manage membership with different roles. Permissions should cascade down from org level to teams to apps and users.

indicators: Nested team hierarchies - pure domain modeling
uncertainties: Integration with existing user identity system
Whether App entity already exists or needs creation
Specific roles needed (admin, member, viewer, etc.)
